title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 1
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {455} \quad M_{A1B1} = {37.92}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {452.92} \quad n_{A1B1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {449} \quad M_{A1B2} = {37.42}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {578.92} \quad n_{A1B2} = {12}\)  \(T_{A1B3} = {353} \quad M_{A1B3} = {29.42}\quad SS_{A1B3} = {168.92} \quad n_{A1B3} = {12}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {500} \quad M_{A2B1} = {41.67}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {428.67} \quad n_{A2B1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {366} \quad M_{A2B2} = {30.5}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {393.0} \quad n_{A2B2} = {12}\)  \(T_{A2B3} = {551} \quad M_{A2B3} = {45.92}\quad SS_{A2B3} = {300.92} \quad n_{A2B3} = {12}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {72} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {71}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {6} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {5}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {72} - {6}\)  \(df_{within} = {66}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104056} - \frac{2674^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104056} - \frac{7150276}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104056} - {99309.39}\)  \(SS_{total} = {4746.61}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {452.92 + 578.92 + 168.92 + 428.67 + 393.0 + 300.92}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2323.35}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4746.61} - {2323.35}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2423.26}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1257}  \quad n_{A_1} = {36}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1417}  \quad n_{A_2} = {36}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.99}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1257}^2}{36} + \frac{{1417}^2}{36}} - \frac{{2674}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1580049}}{36} + \frac{{2007889}}{36}} - \frac{{7150276}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{43890.25} + {55774.69}} - {99309.39}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {99664.94} - {99309.39}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {355.55}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{355.55}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {355.55}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{355.55}{35.2}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {10.1}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{355.55}{{4746.61} - {418.36} - {1649.35}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{355.55}{2678.9}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.13}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {66}) = {10.1}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.13}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {955}  \quad n_{B_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {815}  \quad n_{B_2} = {24}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {904}  \quad n_{B_3} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{955}^2}{24} + \frac{{815}^2}{24} + \frac{{904}^2}{24}} - \frac{{2674}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{912025}}{24} + \frac{{664225}}{24} + \frac{{817216}}{24}} - \frac{{7150276}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{38001.04} + {27676.04} + {34050.67}} - {99309.39}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {99727.75} - {99309.39}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {418.36}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{418.36}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {209.18}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{209.18}{35.2}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {5.94}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{418.36}{{4746.61} - {355.55} - {1649.35}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{418.36}{2741.71}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {5.94}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2423.26} - {355.55} - {418.36}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {1649.35}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{1649.35}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {824.68}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{824.68}{35.2}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {23.43}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1649.35}{{4746.61} - {355.55} - {418.36}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1649.35}{3972.7}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.42}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {23.43}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.42}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 2
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {488} \quad M_{A1B1} = {48.8}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {561.6} \quad n_{A1B1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {411} \quad M_{A1B2} = {41.1}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {336.9} \quad n_{A1B2} = {10}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {472} \quad M_{A2B1} = {47.2}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {567.6} \quad n_{A2B1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {495} \quad M_{A2B2} = {49.5}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {994.5} \quad n_{A2B2} = {10}\)  \(T_{A3B1} = {562} \quad M_{A3B1} = {56.2}\quad SS_{A3B1} = {647.6} \quad n_{A3B1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A3B2} = {546} \quad M_{A3B2} = {54.6}\quad SS_{A3B2} = {1394.4} \quad n_{A3B2} = {10}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {60} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {59}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {6} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {5}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {60} - {6}\)  \(df_{within} = {54}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {153386} - \frac{2974^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {153386} - \frac{8844676}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {153386} - {147411.27}\)  \(SS_{total} = {5974.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {561.6 + 336.9 + 567.6 + 994.5 + 647.6 + 1394.4}\)  \(SS_{within} = {4502.6}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {5974.73} - {4502.6}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1472.13}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {899}  \quad n_{A_1} = {20}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {967}  \quad n_{A_2} = {20}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {1108}  \quad n_{A_3} = {20}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.17}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{899}^2}{20} + \frac{{967}^2}{20} + \frac{{1108}^2}{20}} - \frac{{2974}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{808201}}{20} + \frac{{935089}}{20} + \frac{{1227664}}{20}} - \frac{{8844676}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{40410.05} + {46754.45} + {61383.2}} - {147411.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {148547.7} - {147411.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {1136.43}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{1136.43}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {568.22}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{568.22}{83.38}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {6.81}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1136.43}{{5974.73} - {81.66} - {254.04}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1136.43}{5639.03}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.2}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {54}) = {6.81}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.2}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1522}  \quad n_{B_1} = {30}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1452}  \quad n_{B_2} = {30}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.02}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1522}^2}{30} + \frac{{1452}^2}{30}} - \frac{{2974}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{2316484}}{30} + \frac{{2108304}}{30}} - \frac{{8844676}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{77216.13} + {70276.8}} - {147411.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {147492.93} - {147411.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {81.66}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{81.66}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {81.66}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{81.66}{83.38}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.98}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{81.66}{{5974.73} - {1136.43} - {254.04}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{81.66}{4584.26}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.02}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {54}) = {0.98}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.02}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.17}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1472.13} - {1136.43} - {81.66}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {254.04}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{254.04}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {127.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{127.02}{83.38}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.52}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{254.04}{{5974.73} - {1136.43} - {81.66}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{254.04}{4756.64}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.05}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {54}) = {1.52}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.05}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 3
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.01}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {390} \quad M_{A1B1} = {43.33}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {468.0} \quad n_{A1B1} = {9}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {351} \quad M_{A1B2} = {39.0}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {978.0} \quad n_{A1B2} = {9}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {443} \quad M_{A2B1} = {49.22}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {837.56} \quad n_{A2B1} = {9}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {487} \quad M_{A2B2} = {54.11}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {428.89} \quad n_{A2B2} = {9}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {36} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {35}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {4} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {3}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {36} - {4}\)  \(df_{within} = {32}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81459} - \frac{1671^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81459} - \frac{2792241}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {81459} - {77562.25}\)  \(SS_{total} = {3896.75}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {468.0 + 978.0 + 837.56 + 428.89}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2712.45}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {3896.75} - {2712.45}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1184.3}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {741}  \quad n_{A_1} = {18}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {930}  \quad n_{A_2} = {18}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.5}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{741}^2}{18} + \frac{{930}^2}{18}} - \frac{{1671}^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{549081}}{18} + \frac{{864900}}{18}} - \frac{{2792241}}{36}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{30504.5} + {48050.0}} - {77562.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {78554.5} - {77562.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {992.25}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{992.25}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {992.25}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{992.25}{84.76}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {11.71}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{992.25}{{3896.75} - {0.7} - {191.35}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{992.25}{3704.7}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.27}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {11.71}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.27}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {833}  \quad n_{B_1} = {18}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {838}  \quad n_{B_2} = {18}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.5}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{833}^2}{18} + \frac{{838}^2}{18}} - \frac{{1671}^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{693889}}{18} + \frac{{702244}}{18}} - \frac{{2792241}}{36}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{38549.39} + {39013.56}} - {77562.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {77562.95} - {77562.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {0.7}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.7}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {0.7}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.7}{84.76}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.01}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.7}{{3896.75} - {992.25} - {191.35}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.7}{2713.15}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {0.01}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.5}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1184.3} - {992.25} - {0.7}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {191.35}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{191.35}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {191.35}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{191.35}{84.76}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {2.26}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{191.35}{{3896.75} - {992.25} - {0.7}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{191.35}{2903.8}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.07}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {2.26}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.07}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA

Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.01}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {208} \quad M_{A1B1} = {20.8}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {43.6} \quad n_{A1B1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {200} \quad M_{A1B2} = {20.0}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {26.0} \quad n_{A1B2} = {10}\)  \(T_{A1B3} = {218} \quad M_{A1B3} = {21.8}\quad SS_{A1B3} = {19.6} \quad n_{A1B3} = {10}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {216} \quad M_{A2B1} = {21.6}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {8.4} \quad n_{A2B1} = {10}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {145} \quad M_{A2B2} = {14.5}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {38.5} \quad n_{A2B2} = {10}\)  \(T_{A2B3} = {209} \quad M_{A2B3} = {20.9}\quad SS_{A2B3} = {16.9} \quad n_{A2B3} = {10}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {60} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {59}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {6} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {5}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {60} - {6}\)  \(df_{within} = {54}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {24368} - \frac{1196^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {24368} - \frac{1430416}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {24368} - {23840.27}\)  \(SS_{total} = {527.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {43.6 + 26.0 + 19.6 + 8.4 + 38.5 + 16.9}\)  \(SS_{within} = {153.0}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {527.73} - {153.0}\)  \(SS_{between} = {374.73}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {626}  \quad n_{A_1} = {30}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {570}  \quad n_{A_2} = {30}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.13}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{626}^2}{30} + \frac{{570}^2}{30}} - \frac{{1196}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{391876}}{30} + \frac{{324900}}{30}} - \frac{{1430416}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{13062.53} + {10830.0}} - {23840.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {23892.53} - {23840.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {52.26}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{52.26}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {52.26}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{52.26}{2.83}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {18.47}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{52.26}{{527.73} - {216.23} - {106.24}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{52.26}{205.26}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.25}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {54}) = {18.47}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.25}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {424}  \quad n_{B_1} = {20}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {345}  \quad n_{B_2} = {20}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {427}  \quad n_{B_3} = {20}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.02}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{424}^2}{20} + \frac{{345}^2}{20} + \frac{{427}^2}{20}} - \frac{{1196}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{179776}}{20} + \frac{{119025}}{20} + \frac{{182329}}{20}} - \frac{{1430416}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{8988.8} + {5951.25} + {9116.45}} - {23840.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {24056.5} - {23840.27}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {216.23}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{216.23}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {108.12}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{108.12}{2.83}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {38.2}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{216.23}{{527.73} - {52.26} - {106.24}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{216.23}{369.23}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.59}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {54}) = {38.2}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.59}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.02}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {374.73} - {52.26} - {216.23}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {106.24}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{106.24}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {53.12}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{53.12}{2.83}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {18.77}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{106.24}{{527.73} - {52.26} - {216.23}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{106.24}{259.24}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.41}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {54}) = {18.77}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.41}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {97547} - \frac{1515^2}{24}\)  \(SS_{total} = {97547} - \frac{2295225}{24}\)  \(SS_{total} = {97547} - {95634.38}\)  \(SS_{total} = {1912.62}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {269.33 + 357.33 + 65.5 + 800.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1492.16}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1912.62} - {1492.16}\)  \(SS_{between} = {420.46}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {768}  \quad n_{A_1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {747}  \quad n_{A_2} = {12}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.35}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{768}^2}{12} + \frac{{747}^2}{12}} - \frac{{1515}^2}{24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{589824}}{12} + \frac{{558009}}{12}} - \frac{{2295225}}{24}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{49152.0} + {46500.75}} - {95634.38}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {95652.75} - {95634.38}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {18.37}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{18.37}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {18.37}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{18.37}{74.61}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.25}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{18.37}{{1912.62} - {57.03} - {345.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{18.37}{1510.53}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {20}) = {0.25}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {739}  \quad n_{B_1} = {12}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {776}  \quad n_{B_2} = {12}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.35}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{739}^2}{12} + \frac{{776}^2}{12}} - \frac{{1515}^2}{24}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{546121}}{12} + \frac{{602176}}{12}} - \frac{{2295225}}{24}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{45510.08} + {50181.33}} - {95634.38}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {95691.41} - {95634.38}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {57.03}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{57.03}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {57.03}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{57.03}{74.61}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.76}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{57.03}{{1912.62} - {18.37} - {345.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{57.03}{1549.19}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {20}) = {0.76}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.35}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {420.46} - {18.37} - {57.03}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {345.06}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{345.06}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {345.06}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{345.06}{74.61}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {4.62}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{345.06}{{1912.62} - {18.37} - {57.03}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{345.06}{1837.22}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {20}) = {4.62}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {98983} - \frac{2017^2}{44}\)  \(SS_{total} = {98983} - \frac{4068289}{44}\)  \(SS_{total} = {98983} - {92461.11}\)  \(SS_{total} = {6521.89}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {710.73 + 1482.91 + 1289.64 + 1500.55}\)  \(SS_{within} = {4983.83}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {6521.89} - {4983.83}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1538.06}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1106}  \quad n_{A_1} = {22}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {911}  \quad n_{A_2} = {22}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.31}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1106}^2}{22} + \frac{{911}^2}{22}} - \frac{{2017}^2}{44}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1223236}}{22} + \frac{{829921}}{22}} - \frac{{4068289}}{44}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{55601.64} + {37723.68}} - {92461.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {93325.32} - {92461.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {864.21}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{864.21}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {864.21}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{864.21}{124.6}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {6.94}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{864.21}{{6521.89} - {546.03} - {127.82}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{864.21}{5848.04}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {6.94}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {931}  \quad n_{B_1} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1086}  \quad n_{B_2} = {22}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.31}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{931}^2}{22} + \frac{{1086}^2}{22}} - \frac{{2017}^2}{44}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{866761}}{22} + \frac{{1179396}}{22}} - \frac{{4068289}}{44}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{39398.23} + {53608.91}} - {92461.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {93007.14} - {92461.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {546.03}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{546.03}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {546.03}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{546.03}{124.6}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {4.38}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{546.03}{{6521.89} - {864.21} - {127.82}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{546.03}{5529.86}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.1}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {4.38}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.1}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {175677} - \frac{3221^2}{63}\)  \(SS_{total} = {175677} - \frac{10374841}{63}\)  \(SS_{total} = {175677} - {164680.02}\)  \(SS_{total} = {10996.98}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {245.71 + 846.0 + 357.71 + 355.43 + 283.43 + 1135.71 + 634.0 + 577.71 + 501.43}\)  \(SS_{within} = {4937.13}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {10996.98} - {4937.13}\)  \(SS_{between} = {6059.85}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{833.44}{91.43}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {9.12}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{349.16}{91.43}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {3.82}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{698.31}{{10996.98} - {1666.89} - {3694.65}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{698.31}{5635.44}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {54}) = {3.82}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {8} - {2} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {4}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3694.65}{{10996.98} - {1666.89} - {698.31}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3694.65}{8631.78}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.43}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({4}, {54}) = {10.1}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.43}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31761} - \frac{863^2}{24}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31761} - \frac{744769}{24}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31761} - {31032.04}\)  \(SS_{total} = {728.96}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {33.5 + 153.33 + 21.33 + 55.33}\)  \(SS_{within} = {263.49}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {728.96} - {263.49}\)  \(SS_{between} = {465.47}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {245049} - \frac{3721^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {245049} - \frac{13845841}{60}\)  \(SS_{total} = {245049} - {230764.02}\)  \(SS_{total} = {14284.98}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1074.0 + 3675.33 + 3278.93 + 1433.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = {9461.99}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {14284.98} - {9461.99}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4822.99}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1850}  \quad n_{A_1} = {30}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1871}  \quad n_{A_2} = {30}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.01}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1850}^2}{30} + \frac{{1871}^2}{30}} - \frac{{3721}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{3422500}}{30} + \frac{{3500641}}{30}} - \frac{{13845841}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{114083.33} + {116688.03}} - {230764.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {230771.36} - {230764.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {7.34}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{7.34}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {7.34}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{7.34}{168.96}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.04}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{7.34}{{14284.98} - {3480.81} - {1334.84}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{7.34}{9469.33}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {56}) = {0.04}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {2089}  \quad n_{B_1} = {30}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1632}  \quad n_{B_2} = {30}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.01}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{2089}^2}{30} + \frac{{1632}^2}{30}} - \frac{{3721}^2}{60}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{4363921}}{30} + \frac{{2663424}}{30}} - \frac{{13845841}}{60}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{145464.03} + {88780.8}} - {230764.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {234244.83} - {230764.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {3480.81}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{3480.81}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {3480.81}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{3480.81}{168.96}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {20.6}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3480.81}{{14284.98} - {7.34} - {1334.84}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3480.81}{12942.8}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.27}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {56}) = {20.6}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.27}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.01}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {4822.99} - {7.34} - {3480.81}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {1334.84}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{1334.84}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {1334.84}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{1334.84}{168.96}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {7.9}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1334.84}{{14284.98} - {7.34} - {3480.81}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1334.84}{10796.83}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {56}) = {7.9}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12677} - \frac{715^2}{42}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12677} - \frac{511225}{42}\)  \(SS_{total} = {12677} - {12172.02}\)  \(SS_{total} = {504.98}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {75.43 + 65.71 + 13.71 + 90.86 + 62.86 + 34.86}\)  \(SS_{within} = {343.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {504.98} - {343.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = {161.55}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{141.17}{9.54}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {14.8}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{141.17}{{504.98} - {17.2} - {3.18}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{141.17}{484.6}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {36}) = {14.8}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {242}  \quad n_{B_1} = {14}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {226}  \quad n_{B_2} = {14}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {247}  \quad n_{B_3} = {14}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.26}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{242}^2}{14} + \frac{{226}^2}{14} + \frac{{247}^2}{14}} - \frac{{715}^2}{42}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{58564}}{14} + \frac{{51076}}{14} + \frac{{61009}}{14}} - \frac{{511225}}{42}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{4183.14} + {3648.29} + {4357.79}} - {12172.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {12189.22} - {12172.02}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {17.2}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{17.2}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {8.6}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.26}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {161.55} - {141.17} - {17.2}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {3.18}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{3.18}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {1.59}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{1.59}{9.54}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.17}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3.18}{{504.98} - {141.17} - {17.2}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3.18}{346.61}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {0.17}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{85.54}{8.29}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {10.32}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{171.09}{{774.0} - {14.22} - {41.34}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{171.09}{718.44}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.24}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {10.32}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.24}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {820}  \quad n_{B_1} = {36}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {788}  \quad n_{B_2} = {36}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.99}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{820}^2}{36} + \frac{{788}^2}{36}} - \frac{{1608}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{672400}}{36} + \frac{{620944}}{36}} - \frac{{2585664}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{18677.78} + {17248.44}} - {35912.0}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {35926.22} - {35912.0}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {14.22}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{14.22}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {14.22}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{14.22}{8.29}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {1.72}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{14.22}{{774.0} - {171.09} - {41.34}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{14.22}{561.57}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {66}) = {1.72}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {226.65} - {171.09} - {14.22}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {41.34}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{41.34}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {20.67}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{20.67}{8.29}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {2.49}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{41.34}{{774.0} - {171.09} - {14.22}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{41.34}{588.69}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.07}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {2.49}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.07}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {108210} - \frac{2170^2}{45}\)  \(SS_{total} = {108210} - \frac{4708900}{45}\)  \(SS_{total} = {108210} - {104642.22}\)  \(SS_{total} = {3567.78}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {136.8 + 199.2 + 263.2 + 651.2 + 156.0 + 182.8 + 211.2 + 66.8 + 286.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2153.2}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {3567.78} - {2153.2}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1414.58}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {741}  \quad n_{A_1} = {15}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {732}  \quad n_{A_2} = {15}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {697}  \quad n_{A_3} = {15}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{741}^2}{15} + \frac{{732}^2}{15} + \frac{{697}^2}{15}} - \frac{{2170}^2}{45}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{549081}}{15} + \frac{{535824}}{15} + \frac{{485809}}{15}} - \frac{{4708900}}{45}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{36605.4} + {35721.6} + {32387.27}} - {104642.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {104714.27} - {104642.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {72.05}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{72.05}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {36.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{36.02}{59.81}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.6}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{72.05}{{3567.78} - {84.05} - {1258.48}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{72.05}{2225.25}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {0.6}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {697}  \quad n_{B_1} = {15}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {747}  \quad n_{B_2} = {15}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {726}  \quad n_{B_3} = {15}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{697}^2}{15} + \frac{{747}^2}{15} + \frac{{726}^2}{15}} - \frac{{2170}^2}{45}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{485809}}{15} + \frac{{558009}}{15} + \frac{{527076}}{15}} - \frac{{4708900}}{45}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{32387.27} + {37200.6} + {35138.4}} - {104642.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {104726.27} - {104642.22}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {84.05}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{84.05}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {42.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{42.02}{59.81}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.7}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{84.05}{{3567.78} - {72.05} - {1258.48}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{84.05}{2237.25}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {0.7}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {8} - {2} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {4}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.89}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1414.58} - {72.05} - {84.05}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {1258.48}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{1258.48}{4}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {314.62}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{314.62}{59.81}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {5.26}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1258.48}{{3567.78} - {72.05} - {84.05}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1258.48}{3411.68}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.37}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({4}, {36}) = {5.26}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.37}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {107286} - \frac{2224^2}{48}\)  \(SS_{total} = {107286} - \frac{4946176}{48}\)  \(SS_{total} = {107286} - {103045.33}\)  \(SS_{total} = {4240.67}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {337.88 + 200.88 + 375.88 + 352.88 + 268.0 + 300.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1835.52}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4240.67} - {1835.52}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2405.15}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{1053.08}{43.7}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {24.1}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2106.17}{{4240.67} - {243.01} - {55.97}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2106.17}{3941.69}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.53}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {42}) = {24.1}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.53}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1058}  \quad n_{B_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1166}  \quad n_{B_2} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.07}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1058}^2}{24} + \frac{{1166}^2}{24}} - \frac{{2224}^2}{48}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1119364}}{24} + \frac{{1359556}}{24}} - \frac{{4946176}}{48}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{46640.17} + {56648.17}} - {103045.33}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {103288.34} - {103045.33}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {243.01}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{243.01}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {243.01}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{243.01}{{4240.67} - {2106.17} - {55.97}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{243.01}{2078.53}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {42}) = {5.56}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.22}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2405.15} - {2106.17} - {243.01}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {55.97}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{55.97}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {27.98}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{27.98}{43.7}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.64}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{55.97}{{4240.67} - {2106.17} - {243.01}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{55.97}{1891.49}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {42}) = {0.64}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {135478} - \frac{2180^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {135478} - \frac{4752400}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {135478} - {132011.11}\)  \(SS_{total} = {3466.89}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {194.83 + 114.83 + 352.83 + 124.0 + 74.83 + 233.33}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1094.65}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {3466.89} - {1094.65}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2372.24}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {808}  \quad n_{A_1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {757}  \quad n_{A_2} = {12}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {615}  \quad n_{A_3} = {12}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.39}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{808}^2}{12} + \frac{{757}^2}{12} + \frac{{615}^2}{12}} - \frac{{2180}^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{652864}}{12} + \frac{{573049}}{12} + \frac{{378225}}{12}} - \frac{{4752400}}{36}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{54405.33} + {47754.08} + {31518.75}} - {132011.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {133678.16} - {132011.11}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {1667.05}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{1667.05}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {833.52}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{833.52}{36.49}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {22.84}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1220.55}{{4939.16} - {144.41} - {178.08}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1220.55}{4616.67}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.26}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {84}) = {15.09}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.26}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{178.08}{{4939.16} - {144.41} - {1220.55}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{178.08}{3574.2}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.05}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {84}) = {2.2}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.05}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.15}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {4095.0} - {3301.79} - {412.57}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {380.64}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{380.64}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {380.64}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {82473} - \frac{3129^2}{126}\)  \(SS_{total} = {82473} - \frac{9790641}{126}\)  \(SS_{total} = {82473} - {77703.5}\)  \(SS_{total} = {4769.5}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {175.43 + 179.71 + 272.0 + 127.71 + 339.21 + 281.5 + 187.43 + 499.21 + 160.86}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2223.06}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4769.5} - {2223.06}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2546.44}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{486.16}{19.0}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {25.59}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{972.33}{{4769.5} - {1040.91} - {533.2}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{972.33}{3195.39}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.3}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {117}) = {25.59}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.3}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {908}  \quad n_{B_1} = {42}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1020}  \quad n_{B_2} = {42}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {1201}  \quad n_{B_3} = {42}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.79}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{908}^2}{42} + \frac{{1020}^2}{42} + \frac{{1201}^2}{42}} - \frac{{3129}^2}{126}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{824464}}{42} + \frac{{1040400}}{42} + \frac{{1442401}}{42}} - \frac{{9790641}}{126}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{19630.1} + {24771.43} + {34342.88}} - {77703.5}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {78744.41} - {77703.5}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {1040.91}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{1040.91}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {520.46}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1040.91}{{4769.5} - {972.33} - {533.2}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1040.91}{3263.97}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.32}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {117}) = {27.39}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.32}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {8} - {2} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {4}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{2337.55}{37.77}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {61.89}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{500.6}{{2404.5} - {57.0} - {633.76}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{500.6}{1713.74}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {36}) = {14.85}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {782}  \quad n_{B_1} = {14}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {815}  \quad n_{B_2} = {14}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {818}  \quad n_{B_3} = {14}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{782}^2}{14} + \frac{{815}^2}{14} + \frac{{818}^2}{14}} - \frac{{2415}^2}{42}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{611524}}{14} + \frac{{664225}}{14} + \frac{{669124}}{14}} - \frac{{5832225}}{42}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{43680.29} + {47444.64} + {47794.57}} - {138862.5}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {138919.5} - {138862.5}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {57.0}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{57.0}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {28.5}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{28.5}{33.7}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.85}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{57.0}{{2404.5} - {500.6} - {633.76}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{57.0}{1270.14}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {0.85}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1191.36} - {500.6} - {57.0}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {633.76}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{633.76}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {316.88}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{316.88}{33.7}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {9.4}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{633.76}{{2404.5} - {500.6} - {57.0}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{633.76}{1846.9}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.34}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {9.4}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.34}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {14877} - \frac{775^2}{42}\)  \(SS_{total} = {14877} - \frac{600625}{42}\)  \(SS_{total} = {14877} - {14300.6}\)  \(SS_{total} = {576.4}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {80.86 + 55.71 + 98.86 + 65.43 + 21.71 + 38.86}\)  \(SS_{within} = {361.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {576.4} - {361.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = {214.97}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{43.16}{10.04}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {4.3}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{86.32}{{576.4} - {0.02} - {128.63}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{86.32}{447.75}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {4.3}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {388}  \quad n_{B_1} = {21}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {387}  \quad n_{B_2} = {21}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.4}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{388}^2}{21} + \frac{{387}^2}{21}} - \frac{{775}^2}{42}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{150544}}{21} + \frac{{149769}}{21}} - \frac{{600625}}{42}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{7168.76} + {7131.86}} - {14300.6}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {14300.62} - {14300.6}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {0.02}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.02}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {0.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{0.02}{10.04}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.0}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.02}{{576.4} - {86.32} - {128.63}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.02}{361.45}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {36}) = {0.0}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {214.97} - {86.32} - {0.02}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {128.63}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{128.63}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {64.32}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{64.32}{10.04}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {6.41}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{128.63}{{576.4} - {86.32} - {0.02}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{128.63}{490.06}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.26}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {36}) = {6.41}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.26}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{588.11}{282.01}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {2.09}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{36.0}{282.01}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {0.13}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{36.0}{{10490.56} - {1176.22} - {818.02}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{36.0}{8496.32}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {30}) = {0.13}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.39}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2030.24} - {1176.22} - {36.0}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {818.02}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{818.02}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {409.01}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{409.01}{282.01}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.45}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{818.02}{{10490.56} - {1176.22} - {36.0}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{818.02}{9278.34}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {30}) = {1.45}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.09}\)

text:

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {110536} - \frac{2078^2}{40}\)  \(SS_{total} = {110536} - \frac{4318084}{40}\)  \(SS_{total} = {110536} - {107952.1}\)  \(SS_{total} = {2583.9}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {332.9 + 218.5 + 280.4 + 163.6}\)  \(SS_{within} = {995.4}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2583.9} - {995.4}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1588.5}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1156}  \quad n_{A_1} = {20}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {922}  \quad n_{A_2} = {20}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.11}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1156}^2}{20} + \frac{{922}^2}{20}} - \frac{{2078}^2}{40}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1336336}}{20} + \frac{{850084}}{20}} - \frac{{4318084}}{40}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{66816.8} + {42504.2}} - {107952.1}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {109321.0} - {107952.1}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {1368.9}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{1368.9}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {1368.9}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{1368.9}{27.65}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {49.51}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{129.6}{27.65}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {4.69}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{129.6}{{2583.9} - {1368.9} - {90.0}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{129.6}{1125.0}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {36}) = {4.69}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.11}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1588.5} - {1368.9} - {129.6}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {90.0}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{90.0}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {90.0}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{90.0}{27.65}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {3.25}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{90.0}{{2583.9} - {1368.9} - {129.6}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{90.0}{1085.4}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.08}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {36}) = {3.25}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.08}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{975.02}{26.3}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {37.07}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{324.46}{26.3}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {12.34}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.35}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {73.01} - {8.16} - {48.16}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {16.69}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{16.69}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {16.69}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{16.69}{32.12}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.52}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{16.69}{{715.33} - {8.16} - {48.16}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{16.69}{659.01}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.03}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {20}) = {0.52}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.03}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{192.22}{75.37}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {2.55}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{384.43}{{12078.48} - {1635.2} - {1918.69}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{384.43}{8524.59}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.05}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {108}) = {2.55}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.05}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1797}  \quad n_{B_1} = {39}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1967}  \quad n_{B_2} = {39}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {2154}  \quad n_{B_3} = {39}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.08}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1797}^2}{39} + \frac{{1967}^2}{39} + \frac{{2154}^2}{39}} - \frac{{5918}^2}{117}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{3229209}}{39} + \frac{{3869089}}{39} + \frac{{4639716}}{39}} - \frac{{35022724}}{117}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{82800.23} + {99207.41} + {118967.08}} - {299339.52}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {300974.72} - {299339.52}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {1635.2}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{1635.2}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {817.6}\)

 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1918.69}{{12078.48} - {384.43} - {1635.2}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1918.69}{10058.85}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({4}, {108}) = {6.36}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\)
